product.title: Redeyed Sentinel
product.description: Adds the Redeyed Sentinel CAPTCHA (self-hosted CAPTCHA + IP reputation) to the registration, lost-password and contact forms, each toggleable, with optional block logging. Free and inert until the Site Key and Secret Key are configured.

plugin.title: Redeyed Sentinel: helpers
Redeyed Sentinel: render (registration)
Redeyed Sentinel: render (lost password)
Redeyed Sentinel: render (contact)
Redeyed Sentinel: verify (contact)

phrasetype.name: Redeyed Sentinel
phrasetype.phrase: Public Sentinel site key from Redeyed Lab &rarr; Sentinel &rarr; Sites. Safe to expose in HTML; it renders the CAPTCHA widget on the protected forms.

Per-site Secret Key from Redeyed Lab &rarr; Sentinel &rarr; Sites (shown only once). Used server-side only to authenticate verification and never printed to the page. While this is empty, Sentinel is inert and no submission is ever blocked.
Base URL of the Sentinel service. Defaults to https://redeyed.com. Only change this if you run a self-hosted Sentinel instance.
Show and verify the CAPTCHA on the registration form. On by default.
Show and verify the CAPTCHA on the lost-password form. Off by default. Note: vBulletin hook names vary by version &mdash; if it does not appear, adjust the plugin hookname (see README).
Show and verify the CAPTCHA on the Contact Us form. Off by default. Note: vBulletin hook names vary by version &mdash; if it does not appear, adjust the plugin hookname (see README).

Record each blocked submission (form, IP, outcome, score) to the redeyed_sentinel_log table. On by default. A single product cannot ship an AdminCP page, so review it with SQL (see the product header / README).
Optional. Sets the widget challenge style via data-widget, e.g. behavioral, checkbox, press_hold, or image_pick. Leave empty to use the Sentinel default.
Optional. Sets the widget theme via data-theme: auto, light, or dark. Leave empty to use the Sentinel default (auto).
Optional. Sets the widget colour scheme via data-scheme so it can match your forum styling. Leave empty to use the Sentinel default.

Optional. Sets the minimum challenge strength via data-difficulty: easy, medium, hard, max, or 1–6. This only raises challenge strength above Sentinel's adaptive baseline; it never lowers it. Leave empty to let Sentinel adapt automatically.
Optional. Sets a fixed widget width via data-width, e.g. 300px or 100%. Leave empty to use the Sentinel default width.
